risk_title: Escalation of hostilities and deteriorating security situation disrupting implementation
risk_summary: An escalation of hostilities since late September 2024 has begun to directly affect project implementation and activities.
evidence_quote: “the escalation of hostilities and the sharp deterioration of the security situation in Lebanon, beginning on September 27, 2024, has started to affect project’s implementation.”

risk_title: Implementation constrained in targeted areas affected by strikes
risk_summary: Security developments, including strikes in targeted areas, are severely impacting implementation of some activities managed by UNOPS.
evidence_quote: “recent security developments in the targeted areas, which have been affected by strikes, have severely impacted the implementation of certain activities.”

risk_title: Inability to initiate studies and investments in South Lebanon due to security situation
risk_summary: The security situation prevents initiating planned studies and investments in South Lebanon, requiring phasing and replanning of contracts.
evidence_quote: “given the security situation in Lebanon which does not allow to initiate studies and investments in South Lebanon.”

risk_title: Studies in Nabatieh and Tyre cannot proceed under current security conditions (activity delays/resequencing)
risk_summary: Current security conditions prevent needed studies in Nabatieh and Tyre, pushing the project to consider starting only in Akkar and delaying other zones.
evidence_quote: “the current security situation prevents the consultant from conducting needed studies in Nabatieh and Tyre”

risk_title: Site investigations/visits postponed due to security threats and ongoing hostilities
risk_summary: Security risks and hostilities limit field-based work because key studies require site investigations; safety protocols require postponing visits when risks are present.
evidence_quote: “UNOPs expressed their concern regarding the security risks as most of the studies require stie investigations and visits.”

risk_title: Access constraints due to conflict delaying land delineation (Iqlim el Touffah)
risk_summary: Conflict-related access constraints prevent the surveyor from reaching the site, delaying land delineation needed for planned sanitary landfill works.
evidence_quote: “due to the ongoing conflict in Lebanon, the surveyor cannot access the site, hence the delay in the process of land delineation.”

risk_title: Expected schedule slippage for national POPs plan update due to deteriorating security
risk_summary: Consultant anticipates needing additional time to deliver outputs because of the deteriorating security situation, indicating emerging delays on deliverables.
evidence_quote: “has alerted UNOPS that an extension of 3 months might be needed to deliver the agreed results (or longer if the current deteriorating security situation will continue for a prolonged period).”

risk_title: Force majeure provisions may be invoked due to security-related disruptions
risk_summary: Contracts anticipate potential invocation of force majeure to manage security-related implementation disruptions, signaling active operational impact from FCV conditions.
evidence_quote: “All contracts include a force majeure clause, which will be invoked as necessary to address these challenges”
